title: PET CARE SERVICES - 211info
text: ROGUE VALLEY STREET DOGS PET CARE SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides spay and neuter services, pet gear such as collars, harnesses, and bowls, pet food, and financial assistance for urgent veterinary care when available. Does not cover vet bills already accrued. Volunteer opportunities available and accepts donations of pet food, supplies, and gear as well as financial donations. Eligibility: Low-income households or homeless individuals Hours: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Email (541) 816-6035 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 414-3295 Intake (541) 816-6035 Alternate Intake (541) 816-6035 Intake (541) 414-3295 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call and leave a message, send a message through Facebook page, email, or visit website for information FEES: Varies by service. Copay is requested for veterinary and spay/neuter services. Copays may range from $5-$500 depending on ability of the client to pay and the kind of services needed. No copay may be available. DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish interpretation by arrangement AREA SERVED: Douglas, Jackson, Josephine, and Klamath Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Neuter/Spay Services Pet Care Supplies Pet Food Veterinary Care Expense Assistance Volunteer Opportunities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
